description: A plain candid event photograph (no on-image text or graphics), the second image in the same tweet's photo set. It shows a friendly handshake/greeting indoors: a smiling older woman with curly gray hair, wearing a blue floral-print top, a lanyard ID badge, and a small cross necklace, leans in to shake hands with a dark-haired woman in a white blazer (seen from behind, at left). A smiling man in a pink dress shirt stands behind them, and other attendees plus large industrial equipment (a green engine/generator and ducting) appear in the softly focused background, indicating a facility tour or training center. This is a documentary snapshot with no designed slogan, typography, or agency seal overlaid, so it is marked not designed; it accompanies the tweet about putting 'the hardworking men and women of our nation FIRST.'
